title: Foldable lampshade
abstract: A foldable lampshade is provided, which includes a foldable support frame and a cloth covering, where the cloth covering is detachably connected to the foldable support frame, and the foldable support frame includes an outer support frame, an inner support member, and connecting members connecting the outer support frame and the inner support member. The outer support frame includes a first support member, a second support member, and first joint members, where the first support member is foldably connected to the second support member through the first joint members, the inner support member has a hinge structure, and the rotational axis of the first joint members and the rotational axis of the hinge structure are located on a same axis line. The foldable lampshade adopts a foldable support frame, which has a simple structure, is easy to disassemble and install, and effectively saves the intermediate cost.
claims: 1. A foldable lampshade, comprising: a foldable support frame and a cloth covering; wherein the cloth covering is detachably connected to the foldable support frame; wherein the foldable support frame comprises an outer support frame, an inner support member, and a plurality of connecting members connecting the outer support frame and the inner support member; wherein the outer support frame comprises a first support member, a second support member, and a plurality of first joint members, and the first support member and the second support member are foldably connected via the plurality of first joint members; and the inner support member has a hinge structure, and a rotational axis of the plurality of first joint members and a rotational axis of the hinge structure are located on a same axis line.
